languages.text: "Из-за твоих изысканий страдает работа Сектора Бионика".
"The work of the Sector Bionica is suffering because of your research."
languages.original_text: "Из-за твоих изысканий страдает работа Сектора Бионика".

traits.locale_text: "The work of the Sector Bionica is suffering because of your research."
"The work of the Sector Bionica is suffering because of your research."
"The work of the Sector Bionica is suffering because of your research."

languages.text: "Die Arbeit im Sektor Bionica leidet unter Eurer Forschung."
languages.original_text: "The work of the Sector Bionica is suffering because of your research."

traits.locale_text: "Die Arbeit im Sektor Bionica leidet unter Eurer Forschung."

languages.text: « Vos recherches empêchent le secteur Bionica de faire son travail. »
languages.original_text: "The work of the Sector Bionica is suffering because of your research."

traits.locale_text: « Vos recherches empêchent le secteur Bionica de faire son travail. »

languages.text: “你的研究已经影响到了仿生区的运作。”
languages.original_text: "The work of the Sector Bionica is suffering because of your research."

traits.locale_text: “你的研究已经影响到了仿生区的运作。”

languages.text: «La labor del Sector Bionica sufre a causa de su investigación».
languages.original_text: "The work of the Sector Bionica is suffering because of your research."

traits.locale_text: «La labor del Sector Bionica sufre a causa de su investigación».

languages.text: 「あなたの研究のせいで、バイオニック・セクターの活動は停止している。」
languages.original_text: "The work of the Sector Bionica is suffering because of your research."

traits.locale_text: 「あなたの研究のせいで、バイオニック・セクターの活動は停止している。」

languages.text: "Senin araştırman yüzünden Sektör Biyonika'nın işleri aksıyor."
languages.original_text: "The work of the Sector Bionica is suffering because of your research."

traits.locale_text: "Senin araştırman yüzünden Sektör Biyonika'nın işleri aksıyor."
